contexts.context: ...here because though common practice in England such an <mark>ecumenical</mark> service was a novelty here and caused much comment...
...last that it ought to be some kind of <mark>ecumenical</mark> ceremony held jointly by the two clergymen, but...
...so kind as to confirm that you took the <mark>ecumenical</mark> service - shall ISscall it that? in the church...
